Tournament.title: Tournament
Tournament.description: A sports tournament entity. Publicly readable and listable. Writable only by the owner of the club that owns this tournament (verified by clubId).

clubId.description: The ID of the club that owns this tournament

Match.title: Match
Match.description: An individual match record. Publicly readable and listable. Writable by the owner of the club associated with this match (verified by clubId).

Club.title: Club
Club.description: Sports club profile. Publicly readable and listable. Writable only by the user specified in the ownerId field (ownerId == auth.uid).

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this club

User.title: User
User.description: User profile. Every authenticated user can read and write their own document (document ID must match auth.uid). Platform admins have read access to all profiles.

Participant.title: Participant
Participant.description: Tournament player. Publicly readable and listable. Writable by the participant themselves or the owner of the club hosting the tournament.

Sponsor.title: Sponsor
Sponsor.description: Club partner. Publicly readable and listable. Writable only by the owner of the club (verified by clubId).

/tournaments/{tournamentId}.description: Global tournament registry. Publicly readable and listable. Writable only by the user who owns the associated club.

/matches/{matchId}.description: Match records. Publicly readable and listable. Writable by the owner of the club associated with the match.

/clubs/{clubId}.description: Club profiles. Publicly readable and listable. Writable only by the user specified in the ownerId field (ownerId == auth.uid).

/users/{userId}.description: User profiles. Owner read/write. Admin read.

/participants/{participantId}.description: Tournament entries. Publicly readable and listable. Writable by the participant or the owner of the club hosting the tournament.

/sponsors/{sponsorId}.description: Club partnership details. Publicly readable and listable. Writable only by the owner of the club.
